chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Times When Intercourse is Disliked

text: 4409 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: "يُكْرَهُ اَلْجَنَابَةُ حِينَ تَصْفَرُّ اَلشَّمْسُ وَ حِينَ تَطْلُعُ وَ هِيَ صَفْرَاءُ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4409 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), said: "It is disliked to engage in janabah (ritual impurity due to sexual intercourse) when the sun is turning yellow and when it rises while it is yellow."
